name: pre-commit
description: Anti-shortcut enforcement: TDD gate, branch protection, commit message format

name: pre-merge
description: Gate-5 signature validation, Worktree-Sync reconciliation, records PE signer for SoD

name: pre-deploy
description: Segregation of Duties: merge signer not equal to deploy signer; DevOps veto resolution

name: post-retro
description: Verify Constitution delta and PO/PE co-sign; record Constitution hash on ratified amendments

name: session-start
description: Session init: Gate 0 check, gate sequence, Constitution hash, Scale Track and Delivery Mode fail-hard defaults

name: step-started
description: Emitted before a PLAN step executes. Writes a step.started event to the session journal, honours opt-in step-pause (AMD-CORE-002), and opens a metrics timer.

name: step-completed
description: Emitted after a PLAN step finishes successfully. Closes the metrics timer and writes a step.completed event.

name: step-failed
description: Emitted when a PLAN step exits non-zero. Requires a failure reason and preserves the exit code in the journal event.

name: pre-session-compress
description: Guard: enforces that session compression only touches the in-memory editor context, never journal.jsonl or metrics.jsonl or AUDIT_TRAIL.jsonl. Refuses to run if any disk-truth file is under the compressor input path.

name: pre-tool-use-guard
description: Agent write guard: blocks T3 surface writes and secret patterns in write content; writes AUDIT_TRAIL.jsonl on block
